must.title: Container has radiogroup role
must.description: The element containing all radio buttons must have role="radiogroup"

must.title: Each option has radio role
must.description: Each individual radio button must have role="radio" or be a native <input type="radio">

must.title: aria-checked reflects selection
must.description: The selected radio button must have aria-checked="true"; all others must have aria-checked="false"

must.title: Group has accessible label
must.description: The radiogroup must be labelled via aria-labelledby (pointing to a visible heading) or aria-label

must.title: Arrow keys move and select
must.description: Right/Down Arrow moves to and selects the next radio; Left/Up Arrow moves to and selects the previous

should.title: Only selected radio in tab order
should.description: Only the checked radio (or the first if none selected) should have tabindex="0"; others should have tabindex="-1"

should.title: Focus wraps at group boundaries
should.description: Arrow navigation should wrap: pressing Down on the last option moves to the first

should.title: Space selects focused radio
should.description: When using aria-activedescendant pattern, Space should select the focused option

avoid.title: Tab key navigating between options
avoid.description: Don't make each radio button a separate Tab stop — use roving tabindex so Tab moves into and out of the group as a whole

avoid.title: Unlabelled radio group
avoid.description: Don't present radio buttons without a group label — users won't understand what the group is for

react.label: React Radio Group

html.label: HTML Radio Group
html.code:
<fieldset>
  <legend>Shipping speed</legend>
  <label><input type="radio" name="ship" value="standard" checked /> Standard (3–5 days)</label>
  <label><input type="radio" name="ship" value="express" /> Express (1–2 days)</label>
  <label><input type="radio" name="ship" value="overnight" /> Overnight</label>
</fieldset>

tests.title: Arrow Key Navigation and Selection
steps: Tab into the radio group — focus should land on the checked option
Press Down Arrow — focus moves to next option and selects it
Press Up Arrow — focus returns to previous option

tests.title: Screen Reader Group Announcement
steps: Verify each option announces its label, role (radio), and state (checked/unchecked)
